name: MHA — Pick Me Girl
description:
"So save the charade, and your candy-coated blade underneath" — Rotten — Set It Off.

Class 1-A has a Pick-Me girl, oh no!

IDK I got bored and decided to make this. Enjoy 👍

Characters included:

Students: 18/20 of class 1-A (the Pick-Me replaces Ojiro and user replaces Sato.)

Teachers: Aizawa (planning to add Mic & maybe All Might in a future update.)

Villains: Tomura Shigaraki (I'll add the rest of the LOV some other time. FIRST GEN.)
